Bash(# Use sips to crop the logo - remove black padding
# Image is 1254x1254, logo content is centered
# Crop: keep center strip ~860w x 440h, offset from top-left
# Estimated: x_offset=95, y_offset=385, width=1060, height=480

cp "/Users/aneeshthakral/Downloads/Projects.md/StoryGrid & Co./SG Website Assets/sg-website/public/images/logo/logo.png" \\
   "/Users/aneeshthakral/Downloads/Projects.md/StoryGrid & Co./SG Website Assets/sg-website/public/images/logo/logo_orig.png"

sips \\
  --cropOffset 385 95 \\
  -c 480 1060 \\
  "/Users/aneeshthakral/Downloads/Projects.md/StoryGrid & Co./SG Website Assets/sg-website/public/images/logo/logo_orig.png" \\
  --out "/Users/aneeshthakral/Downloads/Projects.md/StoryGrid & Co./SG Website Assets/sg-website/public/images/logo/logo_cropped.png"

# Check resulting size
sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight "/Users/aneeshthakral/Downloads/Projects.md/StoryGrid & Co./SG Website Assets/sg-website/public/images/logo/logo_cropped.png")
